title: alert(...) should be avoided
description: "alert(...)" should not be usedAnalyze your codeVulnerabilityThis rule is deprecated; useS4507instead.Why is this an issue?More Infoalert(...)as well asconfirm(...)andprompt(...)can be useful for debugging during development, but in production mode this kind of pop-up could expose sensitive information to attackers, and should never be displayed.Noncompliant code exampleif(unexpectedCondition) { alert("Unexpected Condition"); }Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
